validation.summary: Clean control-plane test file parses successfully.

controllerChecks: Tests exercise real CLI clean/reset entrypoints through isolated temp projects and LAUNCHDECK_HOME.
Tests cover path escape refusal, symlink/junction escape refusal, project-root refusal, empty target refusal, running evidence preservation, latest failure evidence preservation, and reset absence.
No production code was modified by the test task.
No inline node -e long-running fixture was introduced.
Leader process scan found no clean/recovery fixture processes left after validation.
acceptedResidualRisks: Symlink/junction coverage is skipped only if the host cannot create the link type.
Empty target refusal is currently enforced at config-load validation before clean planning.
followUpWork: T031 verify or implement any remaining clean control-plane safety integration required by the new tests.
